Description:
Getting going with GitHub Copilot CLI and Work IQ step-by-step.

Signing up for GitHub - https://github.com/signup

Install PowerShell 7 (these are all case sensitive) winget install -e --id Microsoft.PowerShell

Install Microsoft Terminal winget install -e --id Microsoft.WindowsTerminal

Install node.js winget install -e --id OpenJS.NodeJS

Install GitHub Copilot CLI winget install -e --id GitHub.Copilot

Install Work IQ plug-in within the GitHub Copilot CLI /plugin install workiq@copilot-plugins

Accept the EULA (again in GitHub Copilot CLI) workiq accept-eula

▬▬▬▬▬▬ C H A P T E R S ⏰ ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 00:00 - Introduction 00:11 - Why CLIs 01:16 - GitHub Copilot CLI 02:29 - Work IQ 05:19 - Organization onboarding 06:22 - Things I need (accounts) 08:03 - Things to install on my machine 09:05 - Core components 11:20 - Non Windows installation 11:48 - Using Terminal 13:40 - Launching the GitHub Copilot CLI 14:18 - Logging into GitHub 15:41 - My first CLI agentic use 16:06 - Adding Work IQ plug-in 17:23 - Accepting the EULA 18:01 - New Work IQ skill 18:52 - Using Work IQ 19:22 - Authenticating to M365 20:31 - Other types of interaction 23:22 - Using other inferencing models 23:49 - Closing and resuming 24:21 - Non-interactive use
